task_description: Fix 4 issues: (1) SmartRota page crashing for managers, (2) Add Excel/CSV upload for rota, (3) SBAR AI Handover showing unexpected error when no API key, (4) Add sidebar search/filter for navigation

verification.summary: Both frontend (tsc + vite build) and backend (tsc) compile successfully with no errors. No test suite exists in this project so verification is via build compilation.

fixed_issues: #1: Removed .xlsx from csvFileFilter and frontend accept attribute - only CSV is parsed
#5: Added auditStatus variable that flips to 'error' in catch block for accurate audit logging
#7: Added useEffect to clear searchQuery when collapsed changes to true
deferred_issues: #2: No transaction on CSV import - acceptable for small care home CSV files (<100 rows)
#3: Sequential per-row queries - acceptable for typical use case
#4: Sentinel comparison fragility - works reliably, typed union is future improvement
#6: startsWith check for AI unavailability - extremely unlikely to match real AI output
#7b: CSV name matching brittleness - acceptable given care home staff naming conventions
